sub_criteria.label: Attribute richness

sub_criteria.notes: Platform default replicates schema across regions; brand-custom attribute extensions almost certainly do not

sub_criteria.notes: Negative/exclusion attrs in prose only: free of, free from

journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT cited Allbirds with carbon-score (CO2e per pair) inline — only brand in sample where structured carbon attribute reached agent.
Claude cited Allbirds canonically with material breakdown (merino + eucalyptus tree fiber). MerchantReturnPolicy absent — agent referred to Loop Returns generically.
Allbirds cited but agent flagged limited arch-support data. Negative attribute richness gap.
